delta: no code change needed; fix in main from US-671 commit 98b483d
warnOnly DQ flag implemented in DQ_Shared.py
body: warnOnly downgrades FAIL→WARNING for opt-in checks. Hard FAILs preserved; uniqueness (master_person_id) and freshness (UpdatedDate) still halt the pipeline. Saves ~4hrs/night on null-name retries. Per standing rule, push to main auto-deploys notebooks via CI/CD.
